Full Arch Sales Experts | Training & Implementation for Full-Arch Practices
Book a Discovery Call
Full-Arch Training & Implementation

Learn the Framework That Built the Nation’s Largest Full Arch Implant Center

Training and implementation programs designed to improve case acceptance, increase revenue, and create operational consistency — for practice owners, DSO ops leaders, and treatment coordinators.

  • Double booked consults and case acceptance — from 25% to 50%+
  • Add ~9 more full-arch procedures per month without increasing lead volume
  • Drive +$225,000 in monthly revenue (+$2.7M annually) through funnel performance, not higher ad spend

Our Recipe for Success

The Three Pillars of the Full Arch Growth Accelerator

01

Evidence

Built on data from hundreds of real full-arch consultations, our methodology is validated by consistent 70%+ conversion rates and proven patient outcomes.

Leverage a proven playbook that has worked in real settings.

02

Accountability

We don’t just train your team; we track, measure, and hold each member responsible for hitting key metrics and achieving full-arch growth goals.

Bridge theory to practice with hands-on coaching and support.

03

Reinforcement

Continuous feedback and coaching sessions ensure your team masters the process, sustains peak performance, and improves every week.

Implement continuous improvement to build a culture of excellence.

Full Arch Growth Accelerator

Your 6-Month Implementation Roadmap

Onboarding

Your team gets immediate access to our Full Arch Masterclass and begins learning our 8-step sales framework right away. In the onboarding meeting we walk through a full-arch operations checklist to confirm you have every material and SOP in place that’s crucial for your success.

Phase 1Lead Call Training

Lead-call dialogue and coaching to dramatically improve your show rate. We’ve studied emotionally based B2C transactions extensively and know exactly what protocol ensures these nervous patients actually walk through your doors.

Phase 2Operations Training

Establish an effective new-patient journey. Learn what it takes to be perceived as the most polished, professional full-arch practice in your market, and equip your team with the tools, materials, and forms required to deliver an exceptional new-patient experience.

Phase 3Clinical & Sales Presentation

Develop a simple yet compelling clinical presentation and master a collaborative, transparent sales conversation that clearly communicates why you are the undeniable choice for their full-arch treatment.

CoachIQ

Measure & Improve Every Consultation

The first-ever AI platform trained on the Full Arch methodology. It listens, analyzes, and delivers real-time insights so your team can master every consultation.

Real-Time Feedback
Instantly scores every consultation against Stacy’s proven full-arch framework, highlighting missed opportunities and strengths.
Accountability Built-In
Tracks performance by coordinator and clinic so leaders can ensure consistent results week after week.
Sustained Excellence
Ensures every improvement compounds — building lasting consistency in results and revenue.
Call Score 82

Training & Implementation Programs

Build a Scalable Full-Arch Growth System

Training and implementation programs designed to improve case acceptance, increase revenue, and create operational consistency.

Full Arch Sales Masterclass

Best for practices wanting a proven full-arch sales framework

  • Unlimited online course access
  • Self-paced team training
  • Full Arch Sales Framework
  • Lead call, operations, and sales presentation training

Full Arch Sales Bootcamp

Best for practices wanting intensive in-person training and immediate implementation

  • 2-day onsite immersive training
  • Lead call training & role play
  • Clinical and sales presentation coaching
  • Objection handling & financing conversations
  • Team alignment & workflow optimization
  • Live feedback and implementation strategy
Premier Program

Full Arch Growth Accelerator Program (FAGA)

The best results. The highest impact.

Best for practices wanting hands-on implementation and accountability

  • Full Arch Sales Masterclass included
  • Weekly live coaching sessions
  • AI-powered consultation feedback with CoachIQ
  • KPI accountability & team development
  • Operational workflow integration
  • Onsite training support (if needed)
  • Direct access for strategic support
Double your full arch cases within 90 days
without increasing lead volume.

Expected Outcomes

  • Increase full-arch case acceptance rates to 50%+
  • Establish a repeatable, team-driven consult process
  • Build a confident Treatment Coordinator who can close high-ticket cases
  • Improve team accountability and communication
  • Create scalable systems that drive long-term growth and increase profitability

Meet Stacy Farley

Stacy practices what she preaches. She averaged 50 arches a month and achieved a 70% closing rate — setting a new industry standard far surpassing the 25% average conversion rate. Her former office averaged $800,000 to $1,000,000 monthly in collections on just a 5% marketing spend, while the industry average is 20%. Today she teaches dental teams the exact framework that built the nation’s largest full-arch implant center.

Book a discovery call with Stacy’s team

Your First Step Starts Here

Double your full arch cases within 90 days — without increasing lead volume. Book a discovery call to see how the Full Arch Growth Accelerator fits your practice.
